seo.title: Marketplaces implementation checklist
seo.description: A practical checklist for shipping Marketplaces projects safely.

content.intro: This checklist outlines the technical requirements for a production-ready marketplace, focusing on payment integrity, trust systems, and the operational reliability required for two-sided platforms.

items.title: Implement Idempotency Keys
items.description: Ensure all transaction and payout API calls use unique idempotency keys to prevent duplicate charges or double-payouts during network retries.

items.title: Verify Platform Fee Logic
items.description: Unit test the split-payment logic across different transaction sizes to ensure platform commissions and processing fees are calculated correctly before funds reach the seller.

items.title: Configure Webhook Handlers
items.description: Implement robust listeners for payment provider webhooks (e.g., payment_intent.succeeded, account.updated) with signature verification and 200-level response handling.

items.title: Test Refund and Reversal Flows
items.description: Verify that refunding a buyer correctly triggers a reversal of the seller's balance and, if applicable, the platform fee.

items.title: Automate KYC/KYB Onboarding
items.description: Integrate automated checks for seller identity verification and bank account validation to comply with AML regulations before enabling payouts.

items.title: Sanitize and Moderate Reviews
items.description: Implement server-side validation to prevent XSS in reviews and integrate a profanity/spam filter for user-generated content.

items.title: Implement Verified Seller Badges
items.description: Create a logic gate that programmatically applies 'Verified' status only after specific criteria (ID check, first successful sale) are met.

items.title: Deploy User Reporting Workflows
items.description: Build a reporting mechanism on listing and profile pages that flags content for admin review and triggers an automated notification to moderators.

items.title: Secure In-Platform Messaging
items.description: Filter PII (emails, phone numbers) in pre-transaction messages if the business model requires preventing platform circumvention.

items.title: Audit Trail for Sensitive Actions
items.description: Log all administrative actions, including manual payout overrides, account bans, and listing deletions, with a timestamp and user ID.

items.title: Configure Search Index Syncing
items.description: Set up database triggers or webhooks to update the search index (e.g., Algolia) immediately when a listing's price, availability, or status changes.

items.title: Implement Inventory Locking
items.description: Apply a temporary lock on inventory items when a user begins the checkout process to prevent overbooking or double-selling.

items.title: Validate Geo-Spatial Queries
items.description: Test location-based filtering to ensure results are accurately sorted by distance and respect defined radius boundaries.

items.title: Handle Empty Search States
items.description: Implement fallback logic for zero-result queries, such as suggesting similar categories or expanding the search radius.

items.title: Optimize Image Delivery
items.description: Use a CDN with auto-formatting (WebP) and resizing to ensure listing galleries do not degrade page performance or SEO.

items.title: Enforce RBAC Boundaries
items.description: Verify that buyers cannot access seller-specific API endpoints (e.g., payout settings) and sellers cannot modify other sellers' listings.

items.title: Secure Admin Masquerading
items.description: If support staff can 'log in as' a user, ensure this is restricted to specific roles and requires multi-factor authentication.

items.title: Validate Onboarding Completion
items.description: Implement middleware to redirect sellers to the onboarding flow if required profile fields or payment details are missing.

items.title: Test Session Expiry
items.description: Configure shorter session durations for seller dashboards and sensitive financial pages compared to buyer browsing sessions.

items.title: Implement OAuth Scoping
items.description: If using third-party auth (Clerk/Supabase), ensure the JWT claims correctly reflect the user's marketplace role.

items.title: Trigger Order Confirmation Emails
items.description: Automate immediate email delivery to both buyer and seller upon successful payment using a reliable provider like Resend.

items.title: Setup Payout Notifications
items.description: Notify sellers via email or push notification when funds have been initiated for transfer to their bank account.

items.title: Verify SMS for Time-Sensitive Events
items.description: Implement SMS alerts for high-urgency actions like booking requests or last-minute cancellations.

items.title: Configure Unsubscribe Logic
items.description: Ensure marketing communications can be disabled while keeping critical transactional alerts (receipts, safety notices) active.

items.title: Test Email Template Rendering
items.description: Verify that dynamic listing data and pricing tables render correctly across mobile and desktop email clients.
